description: Редизайн лендинга: полноценная маркетинговая страница на / с хедером навигации, hero-секцией, преимуществами, топ-студентами и CTA footer.

userStories.title: Fix routing: render LandingPage on / without redirect
userStories.description: As an unauthenticated user, I want to see the landing page directly at / without being redirected to /landing.
acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/App.tsx, the HomeRedirect component renders <LandingPage /> directly for unauthenticated users instead of <Navigate to='/landing' />
Route '/landing' redirects to '/' via <Navigate to='/' replace />
Authenticated users at '/' are still redirected to their panel: student → /student, employer → /employer, admin → window.location.href = '/admin'
The existing <Route path='/landing' ... /> still exists but now redirects to /
Header component in App.tsx still renders only for authenticated users (no changes needed there)
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
userStories.notes: Only modify frontend/src/App.tsx. Do not touch LandingPage.tsx yet.

userStories.title: Add landing page CSS styles to global.css
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CSS classes for all landing page sections before building the components.
acceptanceCriteria: Add .landing-header class: position sticky, top 0, z-index 100, background rgba(15,17,23,0.85), backdrop-filter blur(12px), border-bottom 1px solid var(--border), padding 12px 24px, display flex, align-items center, justify-content space-between
Add .landing-header-logo class: font-size 18px, font-weight 700, background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2)), -webkit-background-clip text, -webkit-text-fill-color transparent
Add .landing-header-nav class: display flex, gap 12px, align-items center
Add .landing-hero class: text-align center, padding 80px 20px 60px, max-width 800px, margin 0 auto

Add .landing-hero h1 class: font-size 48px, font-weight 800, line-height 1.2, margin-bottom 20px, background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2), var(--green)), -webkit-background-clip text, -webkit-text-fill-color transparent
Add .landing-hero-subtitle class: font-size 20px, color var(--text-muted), margin-bottom 32px, line-height 1.5
Add .landing-hero-actions class: display flex, gap 16px, justify-content center, flex-wrap wrap
Add .landing-section class: max-width 1200px, margin 0 auto, padding 60px 20px
Add .landing-section-title class: text-align center, font-size 32px, font-weight 700, margin-bottom 40px
Add .landing-features-grid class: display grid, grid-template-columns repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)), gap 24px

Add .landing-feature-card class: extends .card with padding 32px, text-align center, transition transform 0.2s and border-color 0.2s; on hover transform translateY(-4px) and border-color var(--accent)
Add .landing-feature-icon class: font-size 40px, margin-bottom 16px, display block
Add .landing-feature-card h3 class: font-size 18px, margin-bottom 12px, color var(--text)
Add .landing-feature-card p class: font-size 14px, color var(--text-muted), line-height 1.6
Add .landing-students-grid class: display grid, grid-template-columns repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)), gap 20px

Add .landing-student-card class: extends .card with text-align center, padding 24px, transition transform 0.2s and border-color 0.2s; on hover transform translateY(-4px) and border-color var(--accent)
Add .landing-student-avatar class: width 80px, height 80px, border-radius 50%, background var(--border), display flex, align-items center, justify-content center, margin 0 auto 16px, overflow hidden
Add .landing-cta class: text-align center, padding 80px 20px, background linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(88,166,255,0.05), rgba(188,140,255,0.05)), border-radius 16px, margin 0 auto, max-width 1200px
Add .btn-outline class: background transparent, border 1px solid var(--accent), color var(--accent); on hover background rgba(88,166,255,0.1)
Add .btn-lg class: font-size 16px, padding 12px 32px
Add responsive media query at max-width 768px: .landing-hero h1 font-size 32px, .landing-hero-subtitle font-size 16px
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
userStories.notes: Only modify frontend/src/styles/global.css. Append all new classes at the end of the file. Do not modify existing classes.

userStories.title: Build landing header and hero section in LandingPage.tsx
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see a navigation header with login/register buttons and an attractive hero section when I open the landing page.
acceptanceCriteria: LandingPage.tsx renders a sticky header at the top with: logo text '🎓 HH Evaluator' using class landing-header-logo on the left, and two navigation buttons on the right using class landing-header-nav
Header has a 'Войти' button (class 'btn btn-outline') that uses navigate('/login') on click
Header has a 'Зарегистрироваться' button (class 'btn btn-primary') that uses navigate('/register') on click
Below the header is a hero section (class landing-hero) with: h1 title 'Найдите лучших выпускников с помощью ИИ', subtitle paragraph (class landing-hero-subtitle) explaining the platform briefly

Hero section has two CTA buttons (class landing-hero-actions): 'Войти' (class 'btn btn-outline btn-lg') navigating to /login, and 'Начать бесплатно' (class 'btn btn-primary btn-lg') navigating to /register
The existing top-students section and CTA section remain intact below the hero (they will be improved in later stories)
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
Verify in browser using Playwright MCP: navigate to http://localhost:8000/, confirm header is visible with both buttons, confirm hero section has title and buttons
userStories.notes: Only modify frontend/src/pages/landing/LandingPage.tsx. Use the CSS classes added in US-002. Keep the existing top-students fetch logic and rendering. Import useNavigate from react-router-dom (already imported).

userStories.title: Add features section to LandingPage
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see platform advantages presented as attractive cards between the hero and top-students sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Between the hero section and the top-students section, add a new section (class landing-section) with h2 title 'Почему наша платформа?' (class landing-section-title)
Section contains a grid (class landing-features-grid) with exactly 4 feature cards (class landing-feature-card)
Feature card 1: icon '🤖', title 'ИИ-оценка навыков', description 'Семантический анализ дисциплин и сопоставление с реальными требованиями рынка труда'
Feature card 2: icon '📊', title 'Данные с hh.ru', description 'Актуальные вакансии и зарплаты на основе парсинга крупнейшей площадки'
Feature card 3: icon '🔒', title 'Анонимный подбор', description 'Работодатели видят компетенции, а не личные данные — до момента приглашения'
Feature card 4: icon '⚡', title 'Быстрый доступ', description 'От регистрации до первого кандидата — менее 5 минут'
Each card has the icon in a span (class landing-feature-icon), h3 for title, p for description
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
Verify in browser using Playwright MCP: navigate to http://localhost:8000/, scroll down, confirm 4 feature cards are visible with correct text
userStories.notes: Only modify frontend/src/pages/landing/LandingPage.tsx. Insert the features section JSX between the hero section and the existing top-students h2/grid.

userStories.title: Improve top-students section styling
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the top-students section to look polished with hover effects and better visual hierarchy.
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap the existing top-students section in a div with class landing-section
Change the h2 to use class landing-section-title
Replace the inline-styled grid div with class landing-students-grid
Replace each student card's inline styles with class landing-student-card
Replace the avatar container's inline styles with class landing-student-avatar
If cards array is empty and not loading, show a styled placeholder: 'Скоро здесь появятся лучшие кандидаты' in a card with text-align center and muted text
The 'Пригласить' button still navigates to /login on click
Salary formatting with formatSalary function is preserved
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
Verify in browser using Playwright MCP: navigate to http://localhost:8000/, scroll to top-students section, verify cards or placeholder are visible
userStories.notes: Only modify frontend/src/pages/landing/LandingPage.tsx. Replace inline styles with CSS classes from US-002. Keep the existing API call logic (useEffect fetching /landing/top-students) and formatSalary function.

userStories.title: Add footer CTA section
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see a final call-to-action at the bottom of the landing page encouraging me to register.
acceptanceCriteria: At the bottom of LandingPage (after top-students section), add a CTA section with class landing-cta inside a landing-section wrapper
CTA section contains: h2 'Готовы найти лучших кандидатов?' styled with font-size 28px and margin-bottom 16px
Subtitle paragraph: 'Зарегистрируйтесь и получите доступ к ИИ-оценке студентов' in muted color
Primary button 'Зарегистрироваться бесплатно' (class 'btn btn-primary btn-lg') navigating to /register
Below button: paragraph with text 'Уже есть аккаунт?' and a Link to /login with text 'Войти'
Import Link from react-router-dom if not already imported
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
Verify in browser using Playwright MCP: navigate to http://localhost:8000/, scroll to bottom, confirm CTA section is visible with register button and login link
userStories.notes: Only modify frontend/src/pages/landing/LandingPage.tsx. Remove the old CTA div that was at the bottom (the one with just 'Зарегистрироваться как работодатель' button). Replace it with the new styled CTA.

userStories.title: Full E2E regression test in Docker
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the entire application works correctly in Docker after the landing redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: Docker containers are running (docker-compose up --build -d) with app on port 8000
Navigate to http://localhost:8000/ — landing page loads with header, hero, features, top-students, CTA sections
Click 'Войти' button in header — navigates to /login page
Navigate back to / — landing is shown again
Click 'Зарегистрироваться' in hero — navigates to /register page
Register a new employer (email: test_e2e_employer@test.com, password: TestPass123, role: employer) — redirects to /employer panel
Logout — returns to landing page at /
Register a new student (email: test_e2e_student@test.com, password: TestPass123, role: student) — redirects to /student panel
Logout — returns to landing page
Login with the employer credentials — navigates to /employer panel
Typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc -b)
userStories.notes: This is a testing-only story. Do not modify code. Run docker-compose up --build -d first, then use Playwright MCP to verify all flows. The app runs at http://localhost:8000.
